tasks.label: create-growth-issues
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/create-content-growth-issues.ps1 2>&1 | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: setup-feature-branches
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; git fetch origin; $branches = @('feat/61-seo-meta-system','feat/62-quiz-share-card','feat/63-related-content-crosslinks'); foreach ($b in $branches) { $exists = git branch -r --list "origin/$b" 2>$null; if ($exists) { Write-Host "$b already exists on remote" } else { git checkout -b $b origin/main; git push origin $b; git checkout main; Write-Host "Created and pushed: $b" } }; git checkout feat/61-seo-meta-system; git branch -v | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8"

tasks.label: git-commit-gitignore-scripts-tasks
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; git add .gitignore .vscode/tasks.json scripts/ 2>$null; git commit -m 'chore: track tasks.json and utility scripts; gitignore log output files'; git push origin main"

tasks.label: chore-pr-scripts-tasks
tasks.command:
pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; git add .gitignore .vscode/tasks.json src/features/blog/pages/BlogPost.tsx scripts/close-rc3-gh.ps1 scripts/close-rc4-issues.ps1 scripts/create-rc2-issues.ps1 scripts/create-rc3-issues.ps1 scripts/setup-rc3-milestone.ps1 scripts/test-gh-auth.ps1 scripts/create-content-growth-issues.ps1; git commit -m 'chore: track utility scripts, tasks.json, gitignore result.json; fix BlogPost useMeta import'; git push origin chore/track-scripts-and-tasks; gh pr create --repo ajeetchouksey/ajch_platform --base main --head chore/track-scripts-and-tasks --title 'chore: track utility scripts, tasks.json, fix BlogPost useMeta import' --body '## Summary
Bundles uncommitted housekeeping items and fixes a post-merge TypeScript regression.

## Changes
- `src/features/blog/pages/BlogPost.tsx` — add missing `useMeta` import + remove duplicate call (caused by feat/61 and feat/63 both touching the file)
- `.gitignore` — add `*-result.json` pattern
- `.vscode/tasks.json` — sprint session tasks (open-prs, git-hotfix-husky-ci, switch-to-*, git-commit-*)
- `scripts/close-rc3-gh.ps1`, `close-rc4-issues.ps1`, `create-rc2-issues.ps1`, `create-rc3-issues.ps1`, `setup-rc3-milestone.ps1`, `test-gh-auth.ps1`, `create-content-growth-issues.ps1`' 2>&1 | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8; Get-Content '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt'"

tasks.label: open-prs-61-62-63
tasks.command:
pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; $out63 = gh pr create --repo ajeetchouksey/ajch_platform --base main --head feat/63-related-content-crosslinks --title 'feat: related content cross-links blog/SkillUp/Tools (closes #63)' --body '## Summary
Surfaces related SkillUp tracks and AI Tools on BlogPost, ExamHome, and Tools catalog using tag/keyword matching at render time -- no network calls.

## Changes
- New ``src/components/RelatedContent.tsx``
- ``BlogPost.tsx`` -- RelatedContent after comments
- ``ExamHome.tsx`` -- RelatedContent after Official Resources
- ``Tools.tsx`` -- Sharpen Your Skills SkillUp cross-links

Closes #63' 2>&1; Write-Host $out63; $out62 = gh pr create --repo ajeetchouksey/ajch_platform --base main --head feat/62-quiz-share-card --title 'feat: post-quiz score share card + ConvertKit email capture (closes #62)' --body '## Summary
Adds a share card to the quiz review phase with LinkedIn/X share buttons and a ConvertKit public form email subscribe.

## Changes
- New ``src/components/QuizShareCard.tsx``
- ``Quiz.tsx`` -- card injected between score block and domain breakdown
- ``.env.example`` -- VITE_CONVERTKIT_FORM_ID documented (public numeric ID, no secret)

Closes #62' 2>&1; Write-Host $out62; $out61 = gh pr create --repo ajeetchouksey/ajch_platform --base main --head feat/61-seo-meta-system --title 'feat: per-route SEO meta via useMeta hook (closes #61)' --body '## Summary
Custom useMeta hook using native DOM APIs -- no react-helmet-async dependency. Sets title, description, og:*, twitter:* on each route.

## Changes
- New ``src/lib/useMeta.ts``
- Applied to: HomeV2, Blog, BlogPost (dynamic), ExamCatalog, ExamHome (dynamic)

Closes #61' 2>&1; Write-Host $out61; @($out63, $out62, $out61) | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8"

tasks.label: git-log-check
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; gh api repos/ajeetchouksey/ajch_platform/commits?per_page=5 --jq '.[].commit.message | split(\"\\n\")[0]' 2>&1 | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8"

tasks.label: git-hotfix-husky-ci
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; git fetch origin; $sha = (git log origin/fix/husky-ci-skip --oneline -1).Split(' ')[0]; Write-Host "Hotfix SHA: $sha"; foreach ($b in @('feat/63-related-content-crosslinks','feat/62-quiz-share-card','feat/61-seo-meta-system')) { git checkout $b; git pull origin $b; git cherry-pick $sha; git push origin $b; Write-Host "Cherry-picked onto $b" }; git checkout main" 2>&1 | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8; Get-Content '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt'

tasks.label: git-push-main
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; git push origin main 2>&1 | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8"

tasks.label: git-branch-push-pr
tasks.command:
pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; git checkout -b chore/precommit-hooks-and-scripts 2>&1; git push origin chore/precommit-hooks-and-scripts 2>&1; gh pr create --repo ajeetchouksey/ajch_platform --base main --head chore/precommit-hooks-and-scripts --title 'chore: pre-commit hooks, utility scripts, gitignore cleanup' --body '## Summary
Adds husky + lint-staged pre-commit quality gates and tracks utility scripts.

## Changes
- `package.json`: husky 9.1.7 + lint-staged 15.5.2, prepare script, lint-staged config
- `.husky/pre-commit`: runs lint-staged then tsc --noEmit
- `scripts/validate-content.mjs`: content quality gate (MCQ schema, blog index, scenarios, MD frontmatter)
- `.gitignore`: track `.vscode/tasks.json`; ignore runtime log/result files
- `.vscode/tasks.json`: cleaned up duplicate entries, added new tasks
- `scripts/*.ps1`: utility scripts now tracked in version control

## Pre-commit checks on every commit
- ESLint --fix on staged .ts/.tsx
- tsc -b --noEmit (whole project)
- JSON schema validation on staged public/content/** files
- MD frontmatter/empty check on staged .md files

Fixes #49' 2>&1 | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8"

tasks.label: test-validate-content
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; node scripts/validate-content.mjs public/content/blog/index.json public/content/skillup/ab100/questions/ab100-domain1.json 2>&1 | Out-File '${workspaceFolder}\validate-test.txt' -Encoding utf8; Write-Host 'done'"

tasks.label: install-precommit-deps
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "cd '${workspaceFolder}'; npm install; npx husky 2>&1"

tasks.label: create-precommit-issue
tasks.command:
pwsh -NoProfile -Command "gh issue create --repo ajeetchouksey/ajch_platform --title 'feat: pre-commit hooks for code quality and content quality checks' --label 'enhancement' --body '## Summary
Add pre-commit hooks to enforce quality gates before every commit lands.

## Scope
### Code Quality
- ESLint on staged .ts/.tsx files
- TypeScript type-check on staged files

### Content Quality
- JSON schema validation on staged public/content/**/*.json files
- Markdown frontmatter validation for staged public/content/**/*.md files

## Implementation
- Install husky + lint-staged
- Configure .husky/pre-commit hook
- Add lint-staged config to package.json
- Add content validation script scripts/validate-content.mjs

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git commit runs ESLint + TS check on staged .ts/.tsx files only
- [ ] git commit validates any staged content JSON/MD files
- [ ] Bad commits are blocked with clear error messages
- [ ] Clean commits pass in < 30 seconds
- [ ] Existing CI remains unchanged' 2>&1"
